name: Jacquet Weston Engineering
message: Jacquet Weston EngineeringJacquet Weston Engineering (JWE) was established in 1973 & is a Private Limited Company, we are market leaders in the Design and Manufacture of plant and ancillary equipment for the surface finishing industry.JWE is a family business with twenty highly skilled employees covering many disciplines, JWE have been based in a new purpose built 20,000 ft² factory on a 1¼ acre site at Lambourn, Membury, near Newbury, Berkshire since 1997. This specialist facility incorporates Workshop, Stores and Offices.The new industry focused factory provides considerable advantages including the significant ability for JWE to pre-assemble and test dry run all plants for client inspection prior to delivery, and ongoing stock supply and management.Geo: United Kingdom - Leak size: 106 GB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
